title: P3: Add C#-side sanitization in ProvisionGoalIfCreativeAsync
description: ProvisionGoalIfCreativeAsync builds raw /give string from Blueprint.Materials[].Block with no sanitization on the C# side (JS adapter side is already sanitized via SAFE_BLOCK_RE). Add Regex.IsMatch(block, @"^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$") validation before building the command string. Defense-in-depth for TSK-0275.
